name: Volvo Settings Shell
summary: Card-based Volvo settings shell with placeholder overview, database settings, connection string, file path, UI configuration, and hardcoded-value externalization pages.

userActions: Browse Volvo settings areas from the hub
Review which Volvo configuration belongs in database settings, file paths, and UI configuration
Inspect the connection string page guidance without exposing secrets in editable plain text
Review the backlog of hardcoded values that should become configuration
preserveRules: Keep the placeholder status explicit in metadata
Keep connection string guidance masked and read-only
Do not describe backlog tracking as a completed externalization workflow
Keep the existing step ordering and card-driven navigation unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: The hub still routes to overview, database settings, connection strings, file paths, UI configuration, and externalization backlog
Metadata reflects the visible placeholder guidance for each Volvo settings area
Metadata does not imply editable secrets or completed persistence logic that the module does not currently implement
validationHints: Confirm each Volvo card still opens the intended screen
Confirm connection string guidance remains masked and non-editable in concept
Confirm metadata continues to describe the hardcoded-values page as backlog tracking rather than finished automation
sensitiveDataRules: Do not expose raw connection strings in UI change requests or mockups
Keep secret-bearing fields masked or routed to deployment-time secret storage
